caption: A screen capture of a web browser displays a video conference call in the top right corner, featuring a man wearing a dark shirt and headphones. The main area of the browser is occupied by a digital brainstorming or mind-mapping tool with a black background. This workspace contains several circular nodes and connecting lines. One prominent section features a white rectangular box containing the text "All Vivious Bufferingway" and a small image of a turtle. To the left of this box is a smaller node with the text "Cash page," connected by a red curved arrow. Other nodes include a blue circular icon with a yellow symbol and a white circular icon with a sketch. The browser tabs at the top list titles such as "That & Learning by Systemdyn," "Future of Society by Systemdyn," and "Rural Community Food System." The scene remains static across the frames, with no perceptible movement or changes in the layout.
